# netbox_fhrp_group (Resource)

From the [official documentation](https://netboxlabs.com/docs/netbox/models/ipam/fhrpgroup/):

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_fhrp_group" "test" {
  protocol    = "vrrp"
  group_id    = 1234
  auth_type   = "md5"
  auth_key    = "SuperSecretKey"
  name        = "test-fhrp-group"
  description = "This is a test group"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (Number) Group ID.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.

### Optional

- `auth_key` (String) Authentication key.
- `auth_type` (String) Auth type.
- `comments` (String) Comments.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `name` (String) Name.
- `tags` (Set of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tags_all` (Set of String)
